en: Therefore, holy brothers, you who share in a heavenly calling, consider Jesus, the apostle and high priest of our confession,
zh: 因此，同蒙天召的聖潔的弟兄啊！你們應該想想耶穌，就是作使徒、作我們所宣認的大祭司的那一位。

en: who was faithful to him who appointed him, just as Moses also was faithful in all God's house.
zh: 他忠於那位委派他的，好像摩西在 神的全家盡忠一樣。

en: For Jesus has been counted worthy of more glory than Moses- as much more glory as the builder of a house has more honor than the house itself.
zh: 他比摩西配得更大的榮耀，好像建造房屋的人比房屋配得更大的尊貴一樣。

en: (For every house is built by someone, but the builder of all things is God.)
zh: 因為每一間房屋都是人建造的，只有萬物是 神建造的。

en: Now Moses was faithful in all God's house as a servant, to testify to the things that were to be spoken later,
zh: 摩西不過是個僕人，在 神的全家盡忠，為以後要傳講的事作證；

en: but Christ is faithful over God's house as a son. And we are his house if indeed we hold fast our confidence and our boasting in our hope.
zh: 但是基督卻是兒子，管理自己的家。如果我們把坦然無懼的心和可誇的盼望持守到底，我們就是他的家了。

en: Therefore, as the Holy Spirit says, "Today, if you hear his voice,
zh: 所以，就像聖靈所說的： “如果你們今天聽從他的聲音，

en: do not harden your hearts as in the rebellion, on the day of testing in the wilderness,
zh: 就不要硬著心， 好像在曠野惹他發怒、 試探他的日子一樣；

en: where your fathers put me to the test and saw my works
zh: 在那裡，你們的祖先以試驗來試探我， 觀看我的作為有四十年之久。

en: for forty years. Therefore I was provoked with that generation, and said, 'They always go astray in their heart; they have not known my ways.'
zh: 所以，我向那個世代的人發怒，說：‘他們心裡常常迷誤， 不認識我的道路。’

en: As I swore in my wrath, 'They shall not enter my rest.'"
zh: 我就在烈怒中起誓，說： ‘他們絕不可進入我的安息。’”

en: Take care, brothers, lest there be in any of you an evil, unbelieving heart, leading you to fall away from the living God.
zh: 弟兄們，你們要小心，免得你們中間有人存著邪惡、不信的心，以致離棄了永活的 神；

en: But exhort one another every day, as long as it is called "today," that none of you may be hardened by the deceitfulness of sin.
zh: 趁著還有叫作“今天”的時候，總要天天互相勸勉，免得你們中間有人受了罪惡的誘惑，心裡就剛硬了。

en: For we share in Christ, if indeed we hold our original confidence firm to the end.
zh: 如果我們把起初的信念堅持到底，就是有分於基督的人了。

en: As it is said, "Today, if you hear his voice, do not harden your hearts as in the rebellion."
zh: 經上說： “如果你們今天聽從他的聲音， 就不要硬著心， 像惹他發怒的時候一樣。”

en: For who were those who heard and yet rebelled? Was it not all those who left Egypt led by Moses?
zh: 那時，聽了他的話而惹他發怒的是誰呢？不就是摩西從埃及領出來的那些人嗎？

en: And with whom was he provoked for forty years? Was it not with those who sinned, whose bodies fell in the wilderness?
zh: 四十年之久， 神向誰發怒呢？不就是向那些犯了罪陳屍曠野的人嗎？

en: And to whom did he swear that they would not enter his rest, but to those who were disobedient?
zh: 他又向誰起誓說，他們絕對不可以進入他的安息呢？不就是向那些不順從的人嗎？

en: So we see that they were unable to enter because of unbelief.
zh: 這樣看來，他們不能進入安息，是因為不信的緣故。
